evaluation.comments: Manual strict line-range review only: inspected the committed pilot 006 artifact and boundary review, the Goal 12A/12B line-range-first planning context, the ignored local selected source excerpt, and the ignored local model output trace. The existing EvaluationRecord schema represented this stricter review honestly through evaluator_type=manual_content_review, failure_tags, and metadata-safe comments; no protocol change was needed. Counts: reviewed_line_range_candidate_count=3; line_range_support_valid_count=3; local_offset_computable_count=3; local_quote_hash_computable_count=3; exact_count=2; approximate_count=1; broad_count=0; missing_count=0; overclaimed_exactness_count=0; line_range_first_improved_over_pilot_005=true. The model emitted line ranges only and did not emit character offsets, quote hashes, or cryptographic hashes. local offsets and quote hashes were computed after line-range validation from accepted full-line spans, not from model-generated hashes. Locator details: SLC-001 source_ref=raw_corpora_sha256:9f9e143429f5842a line_range=12-18 local_char_offsets=478-709 line_span_sha256=fc261f465e11a6f6d5e65f9675fb1fc30b5c56d79fe019f5e2b8b12f6c00595f model_label=exact strict_label=exact line_range_support_valid=true local_offsets_computable=true local_quote_hash_computable=true; SLC-002 source_ref=raw_corpora_sha256:9f9e143429f5842a line_range=33-44 local_char_offsets=1285-1759 line_span_sha256=f473a277e72a588e3340b62a72dac5a0f6ce69b9215fe8625353d729b68f55d7 model_label=approximate strict_label=approximate line_range_support_valid=true local_offsets_computable=true local_quote_hash_computable=true; SLC-003 source_ref=raw_corpora_sha256:9f9e143429f5842a line_range=45-64 local_char_offsets=1759-2525 line_span_sha256=4035f470e3b237bfba5b2cb992b2a0016ade84d378ff3b3b794f80b12ddb9de6 model_label=exact strict_label=exact line_range_support_valid=true local_offsets_computable=true local_quote_hash_computable=true. Line-range-first improved over pilot 005 because it avoided model-proposed character offsets, preserved parseability, and gave reviewer-usable support regions from which local offsets and hashes could be computed after validation. Remaining limitations: the review accepts full-line spans rather than minimal quote spans; line-range support validity does not prove broader trading judgment quality; the comparison note has not yet been updated; this is still proposal-only evidence. raw source text and raw model output are not committed. This review is not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, graduation, or architecture.
